news.summary: The article discusses First Pacific Bancorp's financial report for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. It marks the eighth consecutive profitable quarter for the company. The total assets for the first quarter of 2025 were $456 million, showing an increase of $23 million from the previous year. Total deposits were $390 million, up by $39 million, and total loans were $294 million, up by $17 million from the previous year. Despite minimal non-performing assets, the bank has a strong capital position with $47 million in cash and cash equivalents. The pre-tax, pre-provision profit for the first quarter was $550 thousand, with a net income of $393 thousand. The bank expresses confidence in future growth and its commitment to serving clients. The company's diversified business model and operational discipline are noted as factors behind its sustained performance. They claim to be well-positioned for long-term success in the dynamic market.
news.headline: First Pacific Bancorp remains financially strong as total assets reach $456M, total deposits $390M, and total loans $294M.

news.summary: In SAGUENAY, Canada, Rio Tinto, in partnership with Indium Corporation, has achieved the successful extraction of the initial primary gallium in a R&D venture. The ultimate goal is to generate significant quantities of this crucial mineral found in the bauxite processed at Rio Tinto’s Vaudreuil alumina refinery in Quebec, the country's sole refinery. This first phase was completed at the Indium Corporation research facility in Rome.
news.headline: Rio Tinto extracts first primary gallium with Indium Corporation, aiming to produce commercial quantities from bauxite in Quebec.

news.summary: A company specializing in AI-driven solutions for retail optimization, 7Learnings, has secured more than €10 million in Series B funding to expand its predictive pricing tools, prioritizing growth in North America. Leading the funding round is Acton Capital, a prominent investor in companies such as Etsy, mytheresa, and Clio. High-Tech Gründerfonds (HTGF) also provided continued support. Notably, 7Learnings reached profitability before its Series B funding, distinguishing it from many other fast-growing startups.
news.headline: 7Learnings secures €10M+ Series B funding to expand retail AI platform globally, led by Acton Capital.

news.summary: Barracuda Networks, Inc., a top cybersecurity firm, has introduced revolutionary features that offer adaptive and context-aware defense against new attacks with remarkable precision and swiftness. These capabilities mark a significant advancement in safeguarding against emerging threats, promising unparalleled accuracy and speed in threat identification and mitigation. The company unveiled these groundbreaking updates from its headquarters in Campbell, California on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: Barracuda introduces next-gen threat detection with Multimodal AI for adaptive protection. Accuracy and speed key.

news.summary: Chattanooga, Tennessee - On May 7, 2025, Fenix24™, the top breach recovery company globally, revealed the selection of Mark Waxman as their new brand architect and key advisor. This strategic move is aimed at driving further success in the market and expanding the brand. With this appointment, Fenix24™ looks to leverage Waxman's extensive experience to advance their go-to-market strategies.
news.headline: Fenix24 appoints Mark Waxman as Chief Marketing Officer to lead brand expansion and go-to-market success, stated on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: A prominent education ranking and data analytics entity has recently made a strategic investment in The Red Pen, a top-tier education consultancy. The investment was disclosed on May 7, 2025, without specifying the exact amount. U.S. News & World Report, known globally for its authoritative stance in education rankings, has chosen to back The Red Pen, reinforcing its stature in the field. This move highlights the confidence and interest that the industry leader has in the consultancy's potential and services.
news.headline: U.S. News & World Report invests in Indian education consultancy The Red Pen, expanding services.

news.summary: On May 6, 2025, Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc., based in Pleasanton, California, declared a financial move. As an influential player in engineered structural connectors and building solutions, the company, listed on NYSE as SSD, disclosed that its Board of Directors had approved the decision. This announcement underscores the company's commitment to strategic management decisions aimed at advancing its position in the market.
news.headline: Simpson Manufacturing Co., Inc. declared a quarterly dividend on May 6, 2025.

news.summary: A recent investment round was spearheaded by UPMC Enterprises and included contributions from multiple healthcare entities. The investors involved were MemorialCare Innovation Fund, Rex Health Ventures, Tampa General Hospital Ventures, Memorial Hermann Health System, Frist Cressey Ventures, Storm Ventures, Paramark Ventures, CU Healthcare Innovation Fund, and Mass General. This collaborative effort signifies a significant endorsement of the sector, with combined funding amounting to an undisclosed sum.
news.headline: Carta Healthcare raises $18.25 million in funding to boost AI-driven clinical data extraction and analytics. Multiple investors involved.

news.summary: Today in St. Louis, Edward Jones, a financial services firm, is hosting its semiannual Compliance Symposium on May 7, 2025. The event features firm leaders and guest speakers sharing insights to empower colleagues in making informed decisions to enhance client, colleague, and community experiences. This symposium serves as a platform for discussions on compliance issues and strategies. Edward Jones is known for its commitment to providing valuable knowledge and resources to its employees, with a focus on improving overall operational efficiency and client satisfaction.
news.headline: Edward Jones' Compliance Symposium stresses core values and client protection for effective decisions. Event in St. Louis on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: A group of students from Pembroke Pines Charter High School in Florida have developed a smartphone application utilizing Artificial Intelligence to assist individuals with visual impairments. The innovative app has earned the team grants to enhance STEM initiatives at the school. This exciting news comes after their success was announced in Farmington, Connecticut on May 7, 2025. The students' initiative is set to further support education and technology advancement, showcasing their dedication to making a positive impact on the visually impaired community.
news.headline: Global winner of Otis' challenge is Pembroke Pines Charter HS; they propose AI app for visually impaired and win STEM grants. May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Irving, Texas on May 7, 2025, Reconext, a prominent company specializing in the repair, refurbishment, recovery, and remarketing of electronic devices, revealed its involvement in a substantial data center decommissioning initiative for a leading global technology corporation. This project is of considerable scale, involving the dismantling and repurposing of a vast number of electronic components.
news.headline: Reconext completes major data center project for tech company, promoting environmental benefits of second-life utilization.

news.summary: Ryan Young, AIA, CEO of Interstruct, Inc., recently announced the opening of a new office for Interstruct Design + Build in Charlotte, North Carolina, making it their fourth office alongside their existing locations in Orlando and Tampa. The expansion signifies the company's growth and presence in the region.
news.headline: Interstruct Design + Build opens 4th office in Charlotte, NC, joining Orlando, Tampa; CEO Ryan Young announces expansion.

news.summary: Enveil, a leading company in Privacy Enhancing Technologies safeguarding Data in Use, has been recognized for its contributions to advancing AI TRiSM efforts. The announcement was made today in Washington on May 7, 2025. Enveil has been included in the 2025 Gartner "Market Guide". This recognition underscores the importance of Enveil's role in this sector, highlighting the company's innovative approach to protecting data.
news.headline: Enveil recognized in Gartner Market Guide for AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management for Privacy Enhancing Technologies.

news.summary: A recent initiative has been launched to open up numerous acres of inaccessible public land by collaborating with private landowners and outdoor companies that emphasize the importance of making public land truly open to all. Based in CASPER, Wyo., as of May 7, 2025, this program aims to enhance access to the backcountry. By partnering with private landowners and outdoor brands, the program has successfully unlocked thousands of acres of public land, making it more easily reachable for outdoor enthusiasts.
news.headline: New program, Access Granted Initiative, opens up thousands of acres of public land with private landowners' help.

news.summary: Research unveiled at the Digestive Disease Week Conference in 2025 reveals that genetic risk scores have the potential to pinpoint individuals with an increased likelihood of experiencing nausea from GLP-1 therapies. This discovery paves the way for more precise treatment strategies and drives progress in pharmaceutical research and development. The study was presented in Menlo Park, California, on May 7, 2025, by Phenomix Sciences.
news.headline: Mayo Clinic study uses AI to predict GLP-1 side effects; genetic risk scores can identify patients at higher risk of nausea from therapies. Supports targeted treatment decisions and advances drug development. Study presented at DDW 2025.

news.summary: Digitate, a prominent global SaaS provider of IT and business operations solutions, has unveiled the launch of its premier product, ignio™, in AWS Marketplace. This marketplace features numerous software listings from independent vendors, allowing users to easily discover, evaluate, purchase, and implement software designed to run on Amazon Web Services (AWS). Digitate's AI-driven solutions, which are seamlessly integrated with essential AWS products and services, have brought about notable enhancements in operational efficiency and performance.
news.headline: Digitate's AI platform ignio™ now available on AWS Marketplace, offering seamless integration with AWS services.

news.summary: The top ICT firm in Switzerland, Swisscom, has chosen Blue Planet, a segment of Ciena (NYSE:CIEN), to revamp its assurance systems and procedures with a cohesive solution tailored for handling dynamic, real-time services. Blue Planet's Unified Assurance and Analytics (UAA) will function as Swisscom's assurance platform for fault and performance management across various domains, starting with access and transport, and later expanding to mobile back.
news.headline: Swisscom chooses Blue Planet by Ciena to upgrade assurance systems, focusing on real-time services. #Switzerland #BluePlanet

news.summary: In Morristown, New Jersey, Majesco, a prominent company specializing in cloud insurance software solutions, has formed a partnership with Vertex Inc., a leading global provider of indirect tax technology solutions. This collaboration aims to enhance the Majesco ClaimVantage solution by incorporating Vertex tax knowledge. The resulting transformative tax solution is tailored to provide customers with a comprehensive, seamless, and automated tax calculation process specifically for disability claims and absence management. This announcement marks a significant milestone for both companies involved and signifies a commitment to delivering innovative solutions to their clients.
news.headline: Majesco partners with Vertex to enhance tax solutions for disability claims and absence management, improving efficiency and accuracy.

news.summary: Amazon, a leading technology company traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol AMZN, has revealed its intention to establish an Amazon Web Services (AWS) infrastructure Region in Chile before the conclusion of 2026. This upcoming AWS South America (Chile) Region aims to provide a platform for developers, startups, entrepreneurs, enterprises, and various sectors such as financial services, retail, education, government, and nonprofits to host their applications and cater to their users using data facilities situated in Chile. This initiative underscores Amazon's dedication to expanding its services in the region.
news.headline: Amazon to invest more than $4 billion to launch AWS infrastructure in Chile by 2026, offering services to various sectors.
BANXICO'S HEATH SAYS IT IS HIGHLY PROBABLE THAT THE CENTRAL BANK WILL CONTINUE TO LOWER ITS KEY INTEREST RATE

news.summary: In New York, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV) unveiled its newest report, DV Global Insights: Trends in the Modern Streaming Landscape, focusing on the status of streaming TV advertising in 2025. The report utilizes DV's exclusive measurement data and insights from a worldwide consumer survey comprising 22,000 participants. It delves into the changes in consumer behavior and advertising effectiveness within the streaming landscape.
news.headline: DoubleVerify reports on the state of streaming TV ads in 2025, based on data from 22,000 viewers, examining consumer behavior trends.

news.summary: Seattle-based company Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) shared that they will unveil their financial outcomes for the first quarter concluded on March 31, 2025, on May 13, 2025, at around 4:20 p.m. ET. The announcement will be available in the Press Center segment of their official website. Marchex specializes in leveraging AI and conversational intelligence to enhance operational efficiency and boost revenue.
news.headline: Marchex (NASDAQ: MCHX) will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 13, 2025 at 4:20 p.m. ET. #AI #operational excellence

news.summary: RELEX Solutions, a leading provider of integrated supply chain and retail planning solutions, is reaffirming its dedication to sustainability by actively working towards a greener future. The company, with headquarters in Atlanta and Helsinki, focuses on enabling customers and internal teams to minimize waste and emissions, thereby enhancing overall efficiency in the supply chain. Founded on the principle of waste reduction across the entire value chain, RELEX remains steadfast in its sustainability efforts. These initiatives are highlighted in the organization's annual Sustainability Report, showcasing tangible outcomes such as reduced waste and improved sustainability practices.
news.headline: RELEX aids in creating sustainable supply chains, reducing waste and emissions, boosting efficiency. #sustainability #supplychain

news.summary: NinjaOne®, the automated endpoint management platform based in Austin, Texas, has recently made key appointments within their executive team. Aaron Kinworthy has been named Vice President of Public Sector, where he will oversee sales teams catering to federal, state, and local government as well as education markets. Egon Rinderer has been appointed as the Senior Vice President of Federal and Enterprise Growth. In this role, Rinderer will be responsible for driving NinjaOne’s strategy in the enterprise and federal sectors. These appointments signify a strategic move by NinjaOne to strengthen their focus on public sector and enterprise clientele.
news.headline: NinjaOne appoints Aaron Kinworthy as VP Public Sector and Egon Rinderer as SVP Federal and Enterprise Growth in Austin.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Recurly, a top subscription management platform, revealed its recent acquisition of Prive, a Shopify-centric subscription platform, and Redfast, a tool for personalized subscriber engagement. Following their recognition as the Best Subscription Management Platform by 2025 SubSummit, this move solidifies Recurly as the sole subscription management suite to seamlessly combine billing, payments, analytics, real-time subscriber engagement, and ecommerce subscriptions.
news.headline: Recurly acquires Prive and Redfast to enhance subscription growth, becoming a comprehensive subscription management suite.

news.summary: A company called Emburse, specializing in travel and expense solutions for businesses, unveiled a fresh report titled "AI-Powered Finance: New Practices, ROI and Future Outlook." The report delves into the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) by finance teams in the United States and the United Kingdom to enhance productivity and business results. The study, which surveyed 1,500 finance experts, found that 66% of organizations have delved into AI implementation. However, many are still in the process of figuring out how to fully leverage AI for maximum effectiveness.
news.headline: Emburse survey shows finance teams in US, UK embracing AI cautiously. 66% invested in AI. 1,500 finance professionals surveyed.

news.summary: Augury, a prominent provider of AI solutions for enhancing reliability and process optimization in industrial settings, and Fortune Brands Innovations Inc. (NYSE: FBIN), a leading innovation company focused on improving living spaces, have revealed the outcomes of their collaboration. Fortune Brands Innovations successfully implemented Augury's complete Machine Health solution at its Fiberon facilities. This partnership aims to boost productivity across operations and ensure seamless functioning.
news.headline: Augury and Fortune Brands partner to enhance manufacturing with AI - Fortune Brands deploys Augury’s AI solution at Fiberon sites.

news.summary: In a significant development for maternal healthcare access in rural Ghana, the Kingdom of New Sawereso-Seinuah will inaugurate its inaugural maternity clinic on May 8, 2025. The establishment of this clinic is the outcome of a collaborative effort led by Dr. Carmen Ward-Sullivan, associate dean of the College of Nursing at Samuel Merritt University. Dr. Ward-Sullivan, recognized with the title Nana Ama Manu I, Queen Mother of Development by King Katakyie Agyemang Duah III, played a central role in driving the initiative. This partnership and initiative represent a crucial step towards improving maternal healthcare services in the region.
news.headline: New Ghana clinic in partnership with Samuel Merritt University to deliver maternal care in 11 villages. Maternity clinic in rural Ghana to open on May 8, 2025, led by Dr. Ward-Sullivan.

news.summary: A company based in Research Triangle Park, N.C., Cyberlux Corporation (OTC: CYBL), known for their tactical unmanned aerial systems and advanced defense technologies, has recently formed a strategic alliance with TrellisWare Technologies, Inc. This partnership involves incorporating TrellisWare's cutting-edge low-latency, anti-jam waveform into Cyberlux's newest heavy-lift Group 1 rotary-wing UAS platform. This collaboration is aimed at enhancing First Person View (FPV) operation capabilities. This move signifies an important advancement in the field, bringing together the expertise and technologies of both companies.
news.headline: Cyberlux partners with TrellisWare to integrate anti-jam tech on new UAS platform, enhancing FPV capability.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.2%, marking a significant drop from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. The number of new job openings has also seen a notable increase, with over 200,000 positions becoming available in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has shown strong performance, reaching an all-time high with the main index surpassing 35,000 points. Experts attribute these positive trends to the growing economy and increasing consumer confidence. Furthermore, the government has announced plans to invest $1.5 billion in infrastructure projects to further stimulate economic growth and create additional employment opportunities. Overall, these indicators point towards a healthy and thriving economy.
news.headline: Skechers launches cutting-edge AERO Series for runners, marking an evolution in technical running, without mentioning the source.

news.summary: A company specializing in exploit intelligence, VulnCheck, shared news about the expansion of its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog in Lexington, Mass. The catalog now monitors more than 3,600 known exploited vulnerabilities, catering to over 10,000 users globally. The VulnCheck KEV is accessible through the VulnCheck Community, providing a free intelligence feed for enterprises, cybersecurity firms, government teams, and managed service providers. The company introduced its Community services recently.
news.headline: VulnCheck KEV tracks 3,600+ known exploited vulnerabilities, with over 10,000 global users. Available free for cybersecurity.

news.summary: In Denver, the U.S. Center for SafeSport has released a Summer Safety Checklist to aid in protecting individuals from abuse during sports and other activities. This checklist offers a series of questions to consider beforehand. It serves as a preventative measure to promote safety, especially with an expected rise in summer activities. The checklist aims to address concerns around abuse and ensure the well-being of participants. By asking these critical questions, individuals can better safeguard themselves and others, reflecting the Center's commitment to promoting a safer environment for all.
news.headline: US Center for SafeSport provides Summer Safety Checklist to prevent abuse during sports & activities.

news.summary: In Berlin, Telefónica Germany is developing a cutting-edge public cloud platform for network automation and 5G monetization, using advanced automation software from Blue Planet, a segment of Ciena (NYSE: CIEN). This initiative marks one of the initial instances in Europe where such technology is being deployed at scale. Blue Planet’s Inventory, Orchestration, and 5G Network Slicing tools are integral to supporting Telefónica Germany’s forward-thinking network and IT renovation efforts. These applications facilitate comprehensive resource management, enhance network and service transparency, and automate various processes for improved efficiency.
news.headline: Telefónica Germany partners with Blue Planet to create public cloud-based platform for network automation and 5G monetization.

news.summary: In light of current economic instability and increased expenses due to tariffs and additional charges, recent consumer data from VTEX (NYSE: VTEX) highlights that 82% of Americans consider transparent pricing and the absence of hidden fees as crucial in alleviating stress and enhancing the overall shopping process. The results are derived from a comprehensive survey conducted in April 2025, involving over 1,000 American adults. This indicates a high demand for upfront pricing among consumers, emphasizing the significance of clarity in costs during shopping experiences.
news.headline: 82% of U.S. shoppers demand clear pricing without hidden fees to reduce stress and improve shopping experience.

news.summary: Sweetgreen, a popular restaurant chain, has introduced its first-ever KBBQ menu in collaboration with COTE Korean Steakhouse, which is the only Michelin-starred Korean steakhouse in America. This unique offering will be available nationwide starting on May 13 for a limited time. The menu includes three new entrees that blend Sweetgreen's fresh ingredients with the bold and vibrant flavors of traditional Korean cuisine. COTE Korean Steakhouse, with locations in Manhattan, Miami, and Singapore, is set to open a new outpost in Las Vegas. This exciting collaboration brings together the expertise of both establishments to offer customers a delicious and innovative dining experience.
news.headline: Sweetgreen partners with COTE Korean Steakhouse to launch KBBQ menu nationally on May 13, offering three new entrees.

news.summary: A prominent investment firm, Climate Adaptive Infrastructure ("CAI"), based in Mill Valley, California, revealed their latest investment in a water-as-a-service (WaaS) initiative. This innovative project involves a water reuse and treatment plant being constructed at a semiconductor fabrication facility in the Midwest region of the United States. CAI spearheaded the financing and development of this project in collaboration with Veolia Water Technologies & Solutions. This strategic venture is aimed at advancing energy decarbonization and sustainable water infrastructure efforts.
news.headline: Investment firm CAI partners with Veolia to finance $66M water-as-a-service project for semiconductor plant.

news.summary: In Woodbridge, Virginia, Sev1Tech has secured a significant contract worth $262 million from the U.S. Army’s Program Executive Office, Command, Control and Communications Network.
news.headline: Sev1Tech wins $262M U.S. Army contract for Command, Control, and Communications Network.
BANXICO'S HEATH SAYS SAYS THAT IN ALL THE SCENARIOS CONSIDERED, A SLOWDOWN IN MEXICO'S ECONOMY IS EXPECTED

news.summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) experienced a surge in premarket trading as they released their second-quarter results, surpassing expectations. Despite a 6% decrease in sales compared to the previous year, totaling $2.001 billion, this was still in line with the estimated $1.96 billion. Sales were organically down by 4%. Intelligent Devices sales dropped by 8% to $896 million, Software & Control fell approximately 1% to $568 million, and Lifecycle Services saw an 8% decline to $537 million. Total ARR showed an 8% year-over-year growth. Adjusted EPS stood at $2.45, down 2% from last year but exceeding the analyst consensus of $2.09. Total segment operating earnings saw a 1% increase year-over-year to $408 million, with the segment operating margin expanding to 20.4% from 19.0% due to favorable pricing, cost management, and margin improvement strategies. Additionally, Rockwell Automation collaborated with Amazon to enhance the digital future of manufacturing. Operating cash flow also rose from $120 million to $199 million year-over-year.
news.headline: Rockwell Automation reported Q2 sales of $2.001 billion, down 6% Y/Y, with adjusted EPS at $2.45 (-2% Y/Y). Operating margin expanded to 20.4%.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, VEON Ltd. revealed that its Kazakh software development firm, QazCode, has forged an agreement with Seekr, an AI technology company. This Memorandum of Understanding aims to create and integrate AI-driven B2B solutions within QazCode’s ventures. VEON Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as VEON, is overseeing this partnership for enhanced operational processes.
news.headline: VEON's QazCode partners with Seekr to develop AI solutions for digital growth. Aims to drive B2B solutions.

news.summary: The latest report showcases advancements made by the company in achieving its impact goals, particularly hitting a significant achievement for its Seedlings for Sustainability project. This marks the fourth consecutive year of reporting on progress towards their impact priorities.
news.headline: Vita Coco releases 2024 Impact Report, reaching a milestone in Seedlings for Sustainability initiative.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, e-therapeutics plc revealed upcoming findings on their GalOmic siRNA candidate ETX-312 aimed at treating MASH at the European Association for the Study of the Liver (EASL) Congress from May 7 to May 10, 2025, in London. The company utilizes computational power and biological data to develop RNAi medicines with the potential to transform lives. ETX-312 targets metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis, a significant health concern globally. Stay tuned for the latest advancements in treating this condition.
news.headline: e-therapeutics to present new data on ETX-312 at EASL Congress for MASH treatment, emphasizing its potential as a near-clinic treatment.

news.summary: Through the use of Wix MCP Server, individuals can utilize natural language cues to easily link Wix’s extensive business features with their chosen compatible AI tools. This integration allows users to create personalized experiences on Wix or oversee their Wix-centered business with ease.
news.headline: Wix introduces Model Context Protocol Server for AI-driven web app development, enabling users to connect with AI tools easily.

news.summary: A corporation is set to exhibit the capabilities of Micropolis's autonomous mobile robots and artificial intelligence in boosting productivity and reducing expenses for clients. This showcase emphasizes how these technologies can revolutionize operations, potentially resulting in significant cost savings and efficiency improvements. Through the integration of autonomous mobile robots and AI, the company aims to demonstrate a tailored solution that addresses modern industry challenges. This demonstration will provide insight into how embracing innovation can lead to enhanced performance, with potential reductions in costs exceeding ███ percent based on past trials.
news.headline: Micropolis demonstrates robotics and AI at Make it in the Emirates 2025 to boost productivity and cut costs.

news.summary: Digital Ally, Inc. (Nasdaq: DGLY) has announced that the Nasdaq Hearings Panel has approved their request for continued listing on The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. This decision, issued on May 1, 2025, is contingent on the Company meeting specific requirements. By May 20, 2025, Digital Ally must maintain a stockholders' equity of at least $2.5 million. Additionally, they must meet a bid price of $1.00 by June 6, 2025. The Company is also expected to adhere to all other listing criteria until September 2, 2025.
news.headline: Digital Ally receives positive listing determination from Nasdaq, must meet $2.5M equity requirement by May 20 & $1.00 bid price by June 6, to maintain listing status until Sept 2, 2025.

news.summary: TransGlobal Assets Inc., listed as OTC: TMSH, is focusing on the advancement and upcoming market launch of their main social app called "DateGuard." The company is actively working on the development of this flagship app to cater to user needs.
news.headline: TransGlobal Assets Inc. (OTC: TMSH) focusing on DateGuard app development & pre-market launch.

news.summary: Ken Goldman, who has experience as CFO for various public companies like Yahoo! and Fortinet, as well as serving on numerous boards of directors, often as an audit committee chair, has joined the team. Additionally, former Lyft President Kristin Sverchek, known for her extensive business and corporate governance expertise, is also on board. Their combined experience and expertise will be invaluable as they work together in their new roles.
news.headline: Kodiak adds new board members Ken Goldman and Kristin Sverchek for public listing via merger with Ares Acquisition Corporation II.

news.summary: MKS Instruments, Inc. (NASDAQ: MKSI) disclosed the initiation of construction for its state-of-the-art Atotech chemical manufacturing and TechCenter site at the Asia Industrial Estate Suvarnabhumi near Bangkok, Thailand. This move reflects MKS' dedication to expanding in line with its clientele and offering specialized support to drive technological progress in the area. The new location highlights MKS' support for Thailand's increasing significance in the printed circuit board (“PCB”) sector.
news.headline: MKS begins construction of new facility in Thailand for Atotech chemical manufacturing & TechCenter in Bangkok.

news.summary: Seedtag, a prominent player in contextual advertising, has solidified its position as a disruptor in the industry with a noteworthy 88% increase in revenue during the first quarter of the year. The company's dominance is further affirmed by a significant 120% growth in the North American market. This boost underscores their commitment to leading the way in relevance-first advertising. These developments were disclosed on May 7, 2025, showcasing Seedtag's impressive performance and trajectory in the evolving advertising landscape.
news.headline: Seedtag's North American revenue grows 120% YoY, with U.S. revenue up by 88% in Q1, solidifying its position as a disruptive force in contextual advertising.

news.summary: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. (NASDAQ: FMST) (CSE: FAT) has successfully conducted an airborne geophysical survey over the CLK Uranium Property in northern Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin region. Expert Geophysics Surveys Inc. completed 771 line-kilometers of electromagnetic surveying utilizing its MobileMT™ system. The survey data is currently being processed to identify conductive trends and structural features linked to known uranium mineralization. Foremost expects to receive the interpreted results soon and plans to utilize them to define targets for the approaching summer 2025 drill program.
news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy completed 771 line-kilometers airborne geophysical survey over CLK Uranium Property in Athabasca Basin.
